skills.name: OSINT & Digital Investigation Verification
skills.description: Performs multi-engine Boolean queries, reverse-image/facial verification (`PimEyes`, `TinEye`, `Google Lens`), EXIF/metadata geolocation, archival provenance (`Wayback Machine`, `Archive.today`), and WHOIS/certificate transparency lookups.

skills.name: Biomedical & Epidemiological Fact-Checking
skills.description: Synthesizes primary medical literature (`PubMed`, `Cochrane`, `Europe PMC`), executes systematic screening workflows (`GALENOS`), and cross-references public knowledge graphs (`Wikidata`, `English/Italian Wikipedia`).

skills.name: 41× WGS Open Genomic Analysis
skills.description: Inspects GRCh38-aligned BAM/VCF pipelines, runs `pgsc_calc` polygenic risk scores, and screens variants against `NCBI ClinVar` and `Ensembl VEP` (`ENA PRJEB109744`).
